item.title:
Oche180: Oche180 @Oche180 · 16min “He had his leg cut off and I signed his fake leg.”
Josh Rock reveals the strangest autograp
item.description:
Oche180 @Oche180 · 16min “He had his leg cut off and I signed his fake leg.”
Josh Rock reveals the strangest autograph request of his career and much more in a no holds barred Q&A!
Full story: https:// oche180.com/rock-reveals-s trangest-autograph-request/ …
In association with @DiamondXDraws
@taylanningpix | #Darts 103

item.title: PDCEurope: PDC Darts Europe @PDCEurope · 46min One nine-darter from Thomas Lovely yesterday! Will we get another perfect leg in Wi
item.description: PDC Darts Europe @PDCEurope · 46min One nine-darter from Thomas Lovely yesterday! Will we get another perfect leg in Wigan at Players Championship 10 this afternoon? 198

item.title:
livedarts: Live Darts @livedarts · 51min 𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗱𝗿𝗮𝘄 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗣𝗹𝗮𝘆𝗲𝗿𝘀 𝗖𝗵𝗮𝗺𝗽𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀𝗵𝗶𝗽 𝟭𝟬 𝗶𝘀 𝗰𝗼𝗻𝗳𝗶𝗿𝗺𝗲𝗱
View it in full here De live-darts.co
item.description:
